jp.text: これがボクたちのチカラだ！

10843735.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
10843735.transcript: And I'll be right behind ya!

jp.text: ディアストロフィズム

36197655.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
36197655.transcript: Scratch one off for the good guys!

jp.text: エヘヘ！もっともっと鍛えていかなきゃ！
jp.literal: Hehe... I've gotta keep training harder!

jp.text: 次もこの調子で行くよ！

37799544.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
37799544.transcript: With you around, we can handle anything!

jp.text: ゼタさんがいると心強いや
jp.literal: It's reassuring to have you around, Zeta.

jp.text: ローラン、助かりました！
テヤアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

62623784.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
62623784.transcript: Victory is ours! Good work, team!

jp.text: えへへ、僕たちの勝利だ！

76222039.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
76222039.transcript: Good work! Now let's get back out there!

jp.text: ちょ、うまっ！？ ああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああああ

83655327.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
83655327.transcript: We have to stop ongrumine you!

jp.text: 何が何でも食い止めよ！
jp.literal: I'll stop you no matter what!

90847851.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
90847851.transcript: Who do you take me for?

jp.text: 弱点をついたみたいだね
jp.literal: Looks like I found a weak point.

jp.text: イストリアさんを守ろう！
カオスデトネーション！
はははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははははは

jp.literal: I have to live up to expectations!

147753986.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
147753986.transcript: We can't let Ghandagoza outdo us!

jp.text: ガランツァに負けていられない！
jp.literal: I can't afford to lose to Gallanza!

jp.text: みんな、気合い入れて行くよ！
エアロデトネーション！

jp.literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down!

174736610.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
174736610.transcript: We did it! And we did it together!

jp.text: ヨダルラーハ、頼んだぞ！
ナラクのフォールダウン！
登るしかない！この塔を！
jp.literal: I have no choice but to climb. This tower!

jp.text: ランカイのテンペスト！

178435151.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
178435151.transcript: I wanna be like her when I grow up.

jp.text: シャルロッテさん、かっこいいな！
ミスってたりなんてしない！
jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

jp.text: ナルメアさん、やっぱり凄いや！
ブルー・デトネーション！

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

201127012.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
201127012.transcript: We're together and we'll make it through!

jp.text: みんなで力を合わせれば
jp.literal: If we all combine our powers...

jp.text: アークデトネーション！

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

jp.text: ヘェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェェ
回復ありがとうございます！
このまま攻め続けよう！

236327510.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
236327510.transcript: Keep your heads in the game!

jp.text: みんな、まだ油断できないよ！
jp.literal: Everyone, we still can't let our guard down!

jp.text: これでもっと頑張れる！
jp.literal: I can do even better now!
I have to help them quickly!

250499171.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
250499171.transcript: Furycane! We beat you once, we'll do it again!

jp.text: フラカン！もう一度相手になるぞ！
jp.literal: Hura Kan! I'll be your opponent once again!

255398238.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
255398238.transcript: Literally! Not even I could spot you!

jp.text: ヨダルラーハ、どんどん行きます！
ターン！テンペストブレード！

jp.literal: I still can't let my guard down!
Let's charge ahead with this momentum!

jp.text: 倒れてる場合じゃない！
jp.literal: Now's not the time to be falling!

306704854.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
306704854.transcript: That was some perfect sync there!

310896534.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
310896534.transcript: Our crew fights for what's right!

jp.literal: If we're linking, then even we can do it!

jp.text: もう迷うことなんてない！
ライデンのエラディケート！

jp.literal: I can do it! I'll crush this!

jp.text: みんなの代わりにボクが！
次もこの感じで行こう！

343696191.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
343696191.transcript: Good work! Now let's get back out there!

jp.text: へへへ、まだまだ！強くならなきゃ！
jp.literal: Hehe... I've still got to get stronger!

347720586.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
347720586.transcript: We won't stop until you're free!

jp.text: ボクタチハ絶対ニアチラメナイ!
アースデトネーション！
みんな、気を引き締めていこう！

356408667.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
356408667.transcript: You're already that and more, Lyria!

jp.text: みんな！この調子で行こう！

jp.literal: Let's prepare for what comes next.

378834487.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
378834487.transcript: Lilith! Let Lyria go! Or else!

jp.text: へへへ。さあ、旅を続けよう！

389392225.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
389392225.transcript: It's all on us, team! Let's go!

jp.text: すべてをかけて、倒してみせる！
jp.literal: I'll show you how to defeat it!
As expected, this is the ultimate route.

jp.text: チャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

409753361.label: PL0000_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0200
409753361.transcript: What would I do without you?

jp.text: ありがとうございます！
いいようにはさせない！
jp.literal: I won't let you have it!

jp.text: はい！ジークフリートさん！

jp.literal: I'll charge ahead with this momentum!

441807379.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
441807379.transcript: There we go! Let's do it to it!

450487997.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
450487997.transcript: Heh heh! Our crew is the best!

jp.text: へへへ！またひとつ！全身だ！

452936042.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
452936042.transcript: I've been working on my technique.

jp.text: パーシヴァル！次も合わせよう！

jp.literal: I'll get out of the way!

458439292.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
458439292.transcript: So, do you ever smile or...?

470248971.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
470248971.transcript: I'm not a toddler, you know.

jp.text: ありがとうございます！

484291120.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
484291120.transcript: That catalyst thing better be near.

jp.text: 触媒か。見つかるといいけど。
jp.literal: Activation, huh? Hope it's not found.

484631651.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
484631651.transcript: We did it! And we did it together!

jp.text: へへへ。これが、ぼくたちのちからだ！
ありがとう、カリオストロ
グランサイフォンを傷つけるな！
jp.literal: Don't you dare hurt Gran Saver!

jp.text: これもみんなのおかげだね！
シャルロッテさん、さすがです！
ナルメアさんの剣、鋭いな！

jp.literal: Reginleiv! Overdrive Surge! Rain of Arrows! Armor Break! Decimate! Diastrophism! Tempest Blade!

jp.text: ギュウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウウ
まだまだ気は抜けないね
jp.literal: You're still not letting your guard down, huh?

531518523.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
531518523.transcript: Victory is ours for the taking!

jp.literal: I'll decide it all at once!

jp.text: チャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
ボクが攻撃を引き受ける！
ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ
パーシヴァル！背中は預けるよ！
エーイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイイ

jp.literal: Let's rush in all at once!

jp.text: テアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
ボクタチガマモル！カナラズ！
みんな、今がチャンスだ！

jp.literal: I'll clean this up in one go!
I'll finish this with everything I've got!

jp.text: 次も頼んだよ、ヴェイン！
jp.literal: I'm counting on you again, Vane!

jp.text: うまく巻き込めたかな
jp.literal: Looks like I got everyone involved.

jp.text: ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ
ルリア、無理しちゃだめだよ
jp.literal: Lyria, you can't push yourself too hard.

jp.text: 出撃だ！きっとあと少しだ！
まだ油断はできないよ！
jp.literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down!
What is this power... just what is it?!

jp.text: 了解です！オイゲンさん！
さすがはガンダゴウザさん

jp.literal: Everyone, leave the defense to me!
I've got a good grip on this!

jp.text: 突破口は必ずあるはず！
jp.literal: There must be a way through!

jp.text: タッチアダカルなら倒すだけだ！
jp.literal: If I have to fight him, I'll just defeat him!

602715273.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
602715273.transcript: Can I get back to you later?

jp.text: ここは任せてください！

jp.literal: Let's prepare for the next one!

607671792.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
607671792.transcript: Hopefully we can get to the monastery quick!

jp.text: このまま聖堂に向かお！
jp.literal: Let's head straight for the Holy Way!

618700818.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
618700818.transcript: That worked out... somehow or other.

jp.text: エヘヘ、なんとかやれたかな？
jp.literal: Hehe... I managed to do it somehow!

jp.text: ついていくのがやっとだ！
jp.literal: I'm finally going to follow you!

jp.text: ランスロットのおかげだよ！

624444646.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
624444646.transcript: Concentrate and we can win this!

jp.text: 相手をよく見て戦おう
jp.literal: Let's take a good look at our opponent and fight.

627160127.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
627160127.transcript: We've got this! Just a little more!

jp.text: イッキュリ！あと少しだ！
jp.literal: I can do it! Just a little more!
This might be a bit heavy.
There must be a way to win!

639140283.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
639140283.transcript: To the ends of the skies! To Estalucia!

641235686.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
641235686.transcript: Aww, I bet you say that to all the skyfarers.

652611377.label: PL0000_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
652611377.transcript: Don't take your eyes off them!

jp.literal: I won't take my eyes off you!
Leave the next one to me!

jp.text: ヴェイン、ボクも続けよう！

659252090.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
659252090.transcript: We've come too far to back down now!

jp.text: 今の感覚を忘れないようにしなきゃ

661912051.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
661912051.transcript: We never lose! And that's a fact!

jp.text: へへへ、負けてなんかいられない！
jp.literal: Heh... I can't afford to lose!

jp.text: カリオストロ！頼りにしてるよ！

よっ！  
たっ！  
準備完了！

667080879.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
667080879.transcript: Fear won't ever hold us back!

jp.text: 躊躇してる場合じゃない!
jp.literal: Now's not the time to hesitate!

jp.text: ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ
カタリナ、タスカリマス！

jp.literal: I wonder if I can use this for something.

688378584.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
688378584.transcript: Come on, how often have you saved my hide?

702064990.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
702064990.transcript: To the ends of the skies!

706018764.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
706018764.transcript: What can we do against him!

711372476.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
711372476.transcript: This city doesn't belong to you!

jp.text: これ以上は好きにさせないぞ！
jp.literal: I won't let you go any further!

719715808.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
719715808.transcript: How do we fight this moving castle!

jp.text: ありがとうございます！ヨダルラーハさん！
ここで足止めされてたまるか！
jp.literal: You think you can stop me here?

jp.text: このままいきましょう！

737068789.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
737068789.transcript: Those swords are killer! Cover each other's backs!

jp.text: 負けんか！死角からの攻撃に注意して！
jp.literal: You're in for a fight! Be careful of attacks from the corners!

741788878.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
741788878.transcript: Man, the sky realm is huge!

jp.text: ソララはまだまだ広いな
ありがとう、ランスロット
ファランクス！守ってみせる！
さすがはバザラガさんです！

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!
You can fight with peace of mind!

797518265.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
797518265.transcript: You've held us back long enough!

jp.literal: I won't let you get away with this!

jp.text: さすがです！ジークフリートさん！
レッドデトネーション！
ボクタチナラダイジョウブ！
ボクタチノジャマウスルナ!
ギャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

グラン。場面：damage taken: blocked 3。  
グッ…重い！
お前たちに触媒は渡さない！
jp.literal: I won't hand over the food to you!

jp.text: ボクはドマレナイ！ デアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア

832510046.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
832510046.transcript: Is it just me, or does this primal seem more sinister than last time?

jp.text: やっぱりあの時の聖晶獣とは違う
jp.literal: Still, it's different from that time's Holy Arrow.
I won't let you do as you please!

jp.text: エンゴ、ありがとうございます！

839620877.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
839620877.transcript: This is why we're the best!

jp.literal: You can all count on me!

jp.text: まだ油断はできないね
jp.literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down.

849914737.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
849914737.transcript: We've beat wind primals before! We can do it again!

jp.text: 風を操る聖槍士、今日お手付きだ！
jp.literal: Wind-wielding holy warrior, I'll crush you!
I'm guessing this is how it feels!
I won't let you have your way!

jp.text: 気を引き締めていこう
ツインエッジは任せて
グレンノコラプション！
うっ！息ぴったりだった！
jp.literal: Huh. That was a perfect timing.

908044553.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
908044553.transcript: We did it! We really did it!

jp.literal: Hehe, I did it! This feels great!
I won't let you get away!

919933339.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
919933339.transcript: Like a lot or just a little?

jp.literal: I don't need to be told!

929942885.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
929942885.transcript: Okay, Id. You asked for it!

jp.text: 先へ進ませてもらおう！イド！
jp.literal: I'll go ahead and lead the way! Let's go!

932726701.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
932726701.transcript: There's more where that came from!

933228172.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
933228172.transcript: Wait, that was fun for you?

jp.text: む、無茶だけはしないでよ

jp.literal: I'm not carrying any unnecessary weight!

jp.text: もう後戻りはできない！

957371567.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
957371567.transcript: Score one for the Holy Knights!

jp.text: カッコヨクナッタデス！

970294689.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
970294689.transcript: There we go! Let's do it to it!

jp.text: みんなを守れ！ファランクス！
いい連携だったよ！みんな！

jp.literal: Just 'cause I've got a lot of swords?

jp.text: へへっ。僕は負けられない！

jp.literal: This isn't good... If it keeps going like this...
Now that's what I'm talking about!

jp.text: さすがですね、カタリナさん

1024060886.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
1024060886.transcript: You don't have to tell me twice!

jp.literal: I don't need to be told!
I'm guessing this is how it goes!

jp.text: みんなー！こっちだよー！

1033730586.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
1033730586.transcript: We don't have time to mess around!

jp.text: 立ち止まる時間なんてないんだ！

jp.literal: Let's break through with this momentum!

jp.text: ありがとうございます！

1036929073.label: PL0000_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
1036929073.transcript: To the ends of the skies! To Estalucia!

jp.text: エヘヘ。空の彼方、約束の地へ！
jp.literal: Hehe... beyond the sky, the promise of blood!

jp.text: イェー！ローランさんのおかげです！
ありがとうございます、ロゼッタさん。

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

jp.text: やるべきことをやるんだ！
jp.literal: I'll do what needs to be done!
I'm going to go all out!

jp.text: エヘヘヘヘヘ！よし！うまくいった！
ボキタチナラヤレルハズダ！

1068371272.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
1068371272.transcript: You got another one like that in ya?

50556624.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
50556624.transcript: Couldn't do it without you, Fraux!

jp.text: こちらこそです、フラウさん。
jp.literal: The pleasure is all mine, Fraux!
So this is... the will of darkness?

jp.text: ガランツァ、張り切ってるな！

98536939.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
98536939.transcript: Thanks, but I know my limits.

jp.literal: I'm okay! I can still do this!
I'm coming in with full force!

108094804.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
108094804.transcript: It's easy when we're all on the same page!

jp.text: ありがとうございます、ユーステスさん。
ナルメアさん、かっこよかったよ！

jp.literal: Even if you don't tell me!

134040028.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
134040028.transcript: I don't just trust you, I believe in you!

jp.text: マギラフリラがいて心強いよ
jp.literal: Reginleiv, Overdrive Surge, Rain of Arrows, Armor Break, Decimate, Diastrophism, Tempest Blade.

140852390.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
140852390.transcript: No one does it like us!

jp.text: バッチリ決まってました！
手応えありましたね、カタリナさん。
jp.literal: You've got a good grip on things, Katalina!

247758740.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
247758740.transcript: Got him on the back foot!

260326551.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
260326551.transcript: Mind joining me for the next one too?

jp.text: ベアトリクスさん、次もお願いします！
よし！この調子で行こう！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's keep this momentum going!

318215171.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
318215171.transcript: You keep it up too, Fediel!

jp.text: このままいきましょう！フィディエルさん！
jp.literal: Let's keep going like this, Fediel!

338310549.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
338310549.transcript: The way you throw that ice around, it was beautiful!

jp.text: 砕けた氷の欠片が綺麗で見とれちゃいそうだった
jp.literal: The shattered pieces of ice were so beautiful, I almost couldn't take my eyes off them.

355079360.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
355079360.transcript: A little training goes a long way!

jp.text: フェリとペットたちのおかげだよ！
jp.literal: Thanks to Ferry and the pets!

jp.text: シエテさん、すごかった！
はい！この調子でいきましょう！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's keep this momentum going!

jp.text: ナアチチ！すごい火力だ！
やりましたね、ゼタさん！
ベアトリクスさんもね
次も合わせて見せます！
jp.literal: I'll show you my next move too!

jp.text: 今のは良かったよ、イド！
フラメク、なんて威力だ！

jp.literal: Let's do it all at once!

532573557.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
532573557.transcript: That's why they call you Supreme!

jp.text: さすがはサンダルフォンだね！

539822434.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
539822434.transcript: Not as good as you, Siegfried!

jp.text: ジークフリートさんこそ！
バザラガさん、助かりました！

553129451.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
553129451.transcript: Amazing! He really is a legend!

jp.text: すごい！これが伝説の拳！
jp.literal: Amazing... so this is the legendary fist!
You've got a good grip on this!

jp.text: 今、いい匂いがふわって
jp.literal: I smell something good right now...

602793309.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
602793309.transcript: You've gotten real good at spell-slinging, Io!

jp.text: 魔法の腕に磨きがかかってるね、イオ！
jp.literal: Your magic is getting sharper, Io.

jp.text: グラン：ボクタチナラカテル！

648028669.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
648028669.transcript: I have gone extra rounds with Sir Barold!

jp.literal: Maybe it's the result of my training.

jp.text: はい！みんなのおかげです！
jp.literal: Yes! It's all thanks to everyone!
I still can't afford to let my guard down.

jp.text: 勢いに乗らせてもらいました！

739240118.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
739240118.transcript: See? There's no shame in asking for help.

jp.text: 力を合わせて頑張ろう！
jp.literal: Let's combine our powers and do our best!

jp.text: もっともっと！上を目指すよ！

788751052.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
788751052.transcript: I knew you wouldn't let me down!

jp.text: 繋いでくれるって信じてたよ
jp.literal: I believed you'd link up with me.

791615581.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
791615581.transcript: Glad to have you with us, Gallanza!

jp.text: よろしく頼むよ、ガランツァ

853815550.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
853815550.transcript: Still one of the coolest attacks I've ever seen!

jp.text: シャルロッテさんの奥義、かっこいいな！
jp.literal: Reginleiv! Overdrive Surge! Rain of Arrows! Armor Break! Decimate! Diastrophism! Tempest Blade!

jp.text: フランさん、ありがとうございます！
ありがとうございます！
タイミングバッチリでした！

882506463.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
882506463.transcript: Plenty more where that came from!

jp.literal: Alright, let's go with this momentum!
I'm not going to let you get away with this!

jp.text: フェディエル、大丈夫かな？

jp.literal: This is what I aim for!

980812771.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
980812771.transcript: There's more where that came from!

985915734.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
985915734.transcript: How many cuts was that? Lost count around ten.

jp.text: あの速度で切り刻まれたら、ひとたまりもないはず！
jp.literal: If I get hit by that speed, I won't stand a chance.

1022146154.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
1022146154.transcript: Let's hope it doesn't come to that.

jp.text: 頼りにさせてもらいます！
フェディエル、ありがとう。

1043618620.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
1043618620.transcript: I was just thinking the same thing!

jp.text: シャルロッテさんもね

jp.literal: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!
I'll finish this with all my might!

jp.text: ダンチョウ、ダンチョウ。あ、はい。
……うっ……うっ……うっ……うっ……うっ……よし！

413263637.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
413263637.transcript: Oh man, you make our lives so easy!

jp.text: はっ…はっ…はっ…はっ…はっ…はっ…はっ…
jp.literal: Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah...

565039210.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
565039210.transcript: Heh heh, I could say the same to you!

jp.literal: Yeah! It's been a pleasure fighting alongside you!

jp.text: はい！次も任せてください！
jp.literal: Yes! Leave the next one to me!

jp.text: ありがとう、ソーンさん

669763984.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
669763984.transcript: One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six!

jp.text:
よっ！
一！
二！
三！
四！
五！
六！
はぁ…
jp.literal: One, two, three, four, five, six... Phew!

731599350.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
731599350.transcript: Wow, I wish I could do that!

jp.literal: I can't afford to lose either!

824645121.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
824645121.transcript: You've always got our backs, Seofon!

jp.text: 頼りにしてます、シエテさん！

882162198.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
882162198.transcript: Ah here it goes One... Two... Three.. Four.. Five... Six... ah.

jp.literal: Let's see... one, two, three, four, five, six... seven.

jp.text: エヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘヘ

940314949.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
940314949.transcript: One... two... three... four... five... six...

jp.literal: One, two, three, four, five, six!

jp.text: ありがとうございます！シエテさん！
ありがとう、サンダルフォン

226027865.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
226027865.transcript: Heh! Fly like a Vern! Sting like... Lyria!

jp.text:
はっはっはっ！  
ちちち！  
はっ！  
へっ！

302872674.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
302872674.transcript: Right! I'll hit 'em even harder next time!

jp.text: わかった！合わせてみせる！
jp.literal: Got it! Let's show them together!

339164730.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_2
339164730.transcript: Hut, hyah! Hut, hyah! Hut, hut! Hut, hyah!

jp.literal: Heh heh... Man, you're really something, Sandalphon!

jp.text: この調子で攻め続けよう！

よし！  
おっ、おっ、おっ  
おっ、おっ、おっ  
おっ、おっ  
んん  
ごちそうさま！

166050571.label: PL0000_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
166050571.transcript: Don't mind if I do! That hit the spot!

jp.text:
いただきます！  
んんんんん  
んんんんん  
んんんんん
